svg.title: A realistic production lineup: U19s, one Ronaldo captain, one Rory Delap specialist
svg.desc: A single football pitch with eleven players in a 4-3-3 formation. Nine of the players are blue U19 dots, one is a red Ronaldo dot wearing a captain's armband in the central attacking role, and one is a purple specialist dot placed on the touchline wing, labeled Rory Delap.
svg.text: Most of the squad is U19. One Ronaldo. One specialist. It's enough.
One Ronaldo for the hard calls, one specialist for the niche, nine U19s doing the work
